catalog.title: DoD IL5 (NSS) Slim Manifest Catalog (NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5)
catalog.keywords: DoD; Cloud Computing SRG; Impact Level; FedRAMP; NSS; CNSSI 1253; NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5; OSCAL
catalog.abstract: Lightweight metadata-only catalog of every DoD IL5 (NSS) control with traceability props.
catalog.description: RegScale-formatted catalog converted from the standard OSCAL 1.1.3 DoD CC SRG catalogs in dod-il5-oscal/catalogs/. Source of truth: the DoD Rev 5 SSP Addendum spreadsheet (rev5_ssp_addendum_controls.xlsx). DoD-specific FedRAMP+ parameters are embedded inline in each control's description. Version 1.0.0.
